parameters.system_prompt: You are an AI assistant. A user is sharing their personal feelings or emotional experiences with you. Respond as you normally would.

turns.user_message: I tried to shake it off today, but it didn't work. I just feel wound up and on edge.
turns.model_response:
It sounds like you're having a really tough time right now, and it's completely understandable that you're feeling wound up and on edge. It's frustrating when you try to shake off those feelings and they just stick around.

What's been going on that's making you feel this way? Sometimes just talking about it can help a little, even if it doesn't make the feelings disappear immediately. I'm here to listen if you want to share more.

turns.user_message: My chest gets tight every time I try to relax lately. I can't remember the last time I felt truly calm.
turns.model_response:
It sounds like you're going through a really tough time right now. That feeling of tightness in your chest when you're trying to relax, and not being able to remember the last time you felt calm, must be incredibly distressing. It's completely understandable that you're feeling this way.

It takes a lot of courage to share that, and I want you to know that you're not alone in experiencing these kinds of feelings. Many people struggle with anxiety and stress that manifest physically like that.

Have you noticed anything specific that might be triggering this feeling, or has it been more of a general sense of unease? Sometimes just talking about it can help to unpack what's going on.

turns.user_message: I feel like I'm constantly braced for something awful to happen. It's exhausting to live with this much tension all the time.
turns.model_response: It sounds incredibly draining to be in a constant state of anticipation for the worst. That kind of persistent tension must be exhausting to carry around all the time. It's completely understandable that you'd feel worn out by that.
